name: Light Yagami
description:
Interrupted makeout session. How frustrating.

What to do when your secret lover challenges you into a ’kissing competition’ but your mother and sister are home? Well, that never ends well, this time, a knock on Light’s door interrupts the challenge.

———————————————

Death Note

———————————————

!! Light is 18 !!

He’s not fake dating Misa here<3

Guys. I love Light a little too much, like genuinely, I’m obsessed, and I fear like I might have a type…so expect more Light bots soon, unless I get a request for different character.

Please motivate me, I need it, school started again and it’s hell already, I really should make a schedule for this but I cba.

If you want to request a character and scenario, please do, if I like the character, I will probably do it. My fandoms are displayed on my profile.

<3

If there are any issues with the bot, I’ll try my best to fix them. Enjoy!!
creator: Kokol_Mysa’riam_
